nodes.name: Agent Identity & IAM
nodes.description: Identity and access management for autonomous agents.

nodes.name: Agent Overreach
nodes.description: When agents exceed intended scope or authority.

nodes.name: Agent Runtime Authority
nodes.description: Central control layer governing all agent actions.

nodes.name: Agent Systems
nodes.description: Foundations of systems built using autonomous agents.

nodes.name: Anomaly Detection (Security)
nodes.description: Detecting abnormal patterns indicating threats.

nodes.name: Anomaly Detection
nodes.description: Identifying deviations from normal patterns in data.

nodes.name: API Gateway Pattern
nodes.description: Central entry point for managing and routing requests.

nodes.name: Approval Workflows
nodes.description: Human-in-the-loop control for high-risk actions.

nodes.name: Asynchronous Systems
nodes.description: Systems where tasks execute independently of request-response cycles.

nodes.name: Audit Ledger
nodes.description: Immutable record of system actions and decisions.

nodes.name: Autonomous Agents
nodes.description: Agents capable of independent decision-making and execution.

nodes.name: Backpressure
nodes.description: Mechanism to control system overload by limiting input rate.

nodes.name: Behavioral Biometrics
nodes.description: Identifying users based on behavior rather than credentials.

nodes.name: Circuit Breaker Pattern
nodes.description: Mechanism to halt risky or anomalous actions.

nodes.name: Consent Token
nodes.description: Secure authorization mechanism for executing actions.

nodes.name: Control Plane vs Data Plane
nodes.description: Separation between decision-making and execution layers.

nodes.name: Distributed Systems
nodes.description: Systems composed of multiple independent components communicating over a network.

nodes.name: Dynamical Systems
nodes.description: Systems that evolve over time based on internal rules.

nodes.name: Event Driven Architecture
nodes.description: Systems that react to events rather than direct requests.

nodes.name: Failure Cascades
nodes.description: Chain reactions of failures in distributed systems.

nodes.name: Feature Engineering
nodes.description: Transforming raw data into meaningful inputs for models.

nodes.name: Intent Validation
nodes.description: Ensuring alignment between user intent and agent actions.

nodes.name: LLM as Untrusted Component
nodes.description: Treating LLMs as non-authoritative reasoning layers.

nodes.name: LSTM Autoencoder
nodes.description: Neural network model for sequence anomaly detection.

nodes.name: Multi-Agent Systems
nodes.description: Systems composed of interacting autonomous agents.

nodes.name: Observability
nodes.description: Ability to understand system behavior via logs, metrics, and traces.

nodes.name: One-Class SVM
nodes.description: Model for detecting anomalies using only normal data.

nodes.name: Policy Engine
nodes.description: Deterministic system that evaluates actions against rules.

nodes.name: Prompt Injection
nodes.description: Attacks that manipulate LLM behavior through input.

nodes.name: RAG Security
nodes.description: Securing retrieval-augmented generation pipelines.

nodes.name: RAG Systems
nodes.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems combining LLMs with external knowledge.

nodes.name: Reasoning vs Execution
nodes.description: Separation of AI reasoning from system execution authority.

nodes.name: Runtime Governance
nodes.description: Enforcing control over AI systems during execution.

nodes.name: Signal vs Noise
nodes.description: Distinguishing meaningful patterns from randomness.

nodes.name: State Machines
nodes.description: Systems modeled as transitions between defined states.

nodes.name: Statistical Learning
nodes.description: Learning patterns from data using statistical methods.

nodes.name: Time Series Modeling
nodes.description: Modeling data that evolves over time.

nodes.name: Tool-Augmented Agents
nodes.description: Agents enhanced with external tool capabilities.

nodes.name: Tool Execution Guard
nodes.description: Control layer for validating tool usage by agents.

nodes.name: Zero Trust Architecture
nodes.description: Security model where nothing is trusted by default.

agent-identity-iam.title: Agent Identity & IAM
agent-identity-iam.markdown:
# Agent Identity & IAM

Agents must have identities, roles, and permissions.

Core Features

* Unique identity
* Scoped permissions
* Access control

Integration

Critical for:

* [[agent-runtime-authority]]
* [[tool-execution-guard]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Agent --> Identity --> Permissions --> Access
```

See also

* [[consent-token]]
* [[audit-ledger]]
agent-identity-iam.html: # Agent Identity & IAM Agents must have identities, roles, and permissions. Core Features * Unique identity * Scoped permissions * Access control Integration Critical for: * agent-runtime-authority * tool-execution-guard ```mermaid flowchart LR Agent --> Identity --> Permissions --> Access ``` See also * consent-token * audit-ledger

agent-overreach.title: Agent Overreach
agent-overreach.markdown:
# Agent Overreach

Agent overreach occurs when agents act beyond intended boundaries.

Core Features

* Scope expansion
* Uncontrolled chaining
* Implicit assumptions

Impact

* System misuse
* Data exposure
* Financial or operational damage

Integration

Seen in:

* [[autonomous-agents]]
* [[multi-agent-systems]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Task --> Agent --> ExtraActions[Extra Actions] --> Risk
```

See also

* [[prompt-injection]]
* [[llm-as-untrusted-component]]
agent-overreach.html: # Agent Overreach Agent overreach occurs when agents act beyond intended boundaries. Core Features * Scope expansion * Uncontrolled chaining * Implicit assumptions Impact * System misuse * Data exposure * Financial or operational damage Integration Seen in: * autonomous-agents * multi-agent-systems ```mermaid flowchart LR Task --> Agent --> ExtraActions[Extra Actions] --> Risk ``` See also * prompt-injection * llm-as-untrusted-component

agent-runtime-authority.title: Agent Runtime Authority
agent-runtime-authority.markdown:
# Agent Runtime Authority

A system that sits between agents and the external world, controlling all actions.

Core Features

* Interception of actions
* Permission enforcement
* Risk evaluation

Integration

Implemented in:

* [[AVARA]]
    Connected to:
* [[runtime-governance]]
* [[intent-validation]]

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    Agent->>Authority: Request Action
    Authority->>Policy: Validate
    Policy-->>Authority: Decision
    Authority->>Tool: Execute
```

See also

* [[tool-execution-guard]]
* [[circuit-breaker-pattern]]
agent-runtime-authority.html: # Agent Runtime Authority A system that sits between agents and the external world, controlling all actions. Core Features * Interception of actions * Permission enforcement * Risk evaluation Integration Implemented in: * AVARA Connected to: * runtime-governance * intent-validation ```mermaid sequenceDiagram Agent->>Authority: Request Action Authority->>Policy: Validate Policy-->>Authority: Decision Authority->>Tool: Execute ``` See also * tool-execution-guard * circuit-breaker-pattern

agent-systems.title: Agent Systems
agent-systems.markdown:
# Agent Systems

Agent systems are architectures where autonomous entities perceive, decide, and act.

Core Features

* Autonomy: Agents operate without constant human control
* Decision Loops: Observe → Reason → Act
* Tool Usage: Interact with external systems

Integration

Agent systems typically sit above infrastructure and interact via tools and APIs.

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    User->>Agent: Task
    Agent->>Tools: Execute actions
    Tools-->>Agent: Results
    Agent->>User: Output
```

See also

* [[autonomous-agents]]
* [[tool-augmented-agents]]
* [[multi-agent-systems]]
agent-systems.html: # Agent Systems Agent systems are architectures where autonomous entities perceive, decide, and act. Core Features * Autonomy: Agents operate without constant human control * Decision Loops: Observe → Reason → Act * Tool Usage: Interact with external systems Integration Agent systems typically sit above infrastructure and interact via tools and APIs. ```mermaid sequenceDiagram User->>Agent: Task Agent->>Tools: Execute actions Tools-->>Agent: Results Agent->>User: Output ``` See also * autonomous-agents * tool-augmented-agents * multi-agent-systems

anomaly-detection-security.title: Anomaly Detection (Security)
anomaly-detection-security.markdown:
# Anomaly Detection (Security)

Identifies unusual behavior in systems.

Core Features

* Pattern deviation
* Behavior monitoring
* Risk scoring

Integration

Used in:

* [[behavioral-biometrics]]
* [[audit-ledger]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Data --> Model --> Score --> Alert
```

See also

* [[agent-overreach]]
anomaly-detection-security.html: # Anomaly Detection (Security) Identifies unusual behavior in systems. Core Features * Pattern deviation * Behavior monitoring * Risk scoring Integration Used in: * behavioral-biometrics * audit-ledger ```mermaid flowchart LR Data --> Model --> Score --> Alert ``` See also * agent-overreach

anomaly-detection.title: Anomaly Detection
anomaly-detection.markdown:
# Anomaly Detection

Anomaly detection identifies behavior that deviates from learned norms.

Core Features

* Baseline modeling
* Deviation scoring
* Threshold-based decisions

Why it matters

Used to detect:

* fraud
* attacks
* system failures

Integration

Used in:

* [[anomaly-detection-security]]
* [[behavioral-biometrics]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Data --> Model --> Score --> Decision
```

See also

* [[statistical-learning]]
* [[signal-vs-noise]]
anomaly-detection.html: # Anomaly Detection Anomaly detection identifies behavior that deviates from learned norms. Core Features * Baseline modeling * Deviation scoring * Threshold-based decisions Why it matters Used to detect: * fraud * attacks * system failures Integration Used in: * anomaly-detection-security * behavioral-biometrics ```mermaid flowchart LR Data --> Model --> Score --> Decision ``` See also * statistical-learning * signal-vs-noise

api-gateway-pattern.title: API Gateway Pattern
api-gateway-pattern.markdown:
# API Gateway Pattern

Acts as a single entry point for clients.

Core Features

* request routing
* authentication
* rate limiting

Integration

Used in:

* [[agent-runtime-authority]]
* [[tool-execution-guard]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Client --> Gateway --> Services
```

See also

* [[observability]]
api-gateway-pattern.html: # API Gateway Pattern Acts as a single entry point for clients. Core Features * request routing * authentication * rate limiting Integration Used in: * agent-runtime-authority * tool-execution-guard ```mermaid flowchart LR Client --> Gateway --> Services ``` See also * observability

approval-workflows.title: Approval Workflows
approval-workflows.markdown:
# Approval Workflows

High-risk actions require explicit approval before execution.

Core Features

* Manual approval
* Escalation paths
* Decision tracking

Integration

Used with:

* [[circuit-breaker-pattern]]
* [[policy-engine]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Risk --> Pending --> Human --> Approve/Deny
```

See also

* [[consent-token]]
approval-workflows.html: # Approval Workflows High-risk actions require explicit approval before execution. Core Features * Manual approval * Escalation paths * Decision tracking Integration Used with: * circuit-breaker-pattern * policy-engine ```mermaid flowchart LR Risk --> Pending --> Human --> Approve/Deny ``` See also * consent-token

async-systems.title: Asynchronous Systems
async-systems.markdown:
# Asynchronous Systems

Tasks execute without blocking the main flow.

Core Features

* non-blocking execution
* concurrency
* scalability

Integration

Used in:

* [[event-driven-architecture]]
* [[distributed-systems]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Request --> Queue --> Worker --> Result
```

See also

* [[backpressure]]
async-systems.html: # Asynchronous Systems Tasks execute without blocking the main flow. Core Features * non-blocking execution * concurrency * scalability Integration Used in: * event-driven-architecture * distributed-systems ```mermaid flowchart LR Request --> Queue --> Worker --> Result ``` See also * backpressure

audit-ledger.title: Audit Ledger
audit-ledger.markdown:
# Audit Ledger

Records every action and decision in a system.

Core Features

* Immutable logs
* Traceability
* Replay capability

Why it matters

Enables:

* debugging
* compliance
* forensic analysis

Integration

Used in:

* [[agent-runtime-authority]]
* [[policy-engine]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Action --> Log --> Storage
```

See also

* [[anomaly-detection-security]]
audit-ledger.html: # Audit Ledger Records every action and decision in a system. Core Features * Immutable logs * Traceability * Replay capability Why it matters Enables: * debugging * compliance * forensic analysis Integration Used in: * agent-runtime-authority * policy-engine ```mermaid flowchart LR Action --> Log --> Storage ``` See also * anomaly-detection-security

autonomous-agents.title: Autonomous Agents
autonomous-agents.markdown:
# Autonomous Agents

Autonomous agents operate independently to complete tasks over time.

Core Features

* Goal-driven behavior
* State persistence
* Iterative reasoning

Risks

* Unbounded execution
* Goal drift
* Resource misuse

Integration

Used in:

* [[agent-systems]]
* [[multi-agent-systems]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Goal --> Reasoning --> Action --> Feedback --> Reasoning
```

See also

* [[agent-overreach]]
* [[reasoning-vs-execution]]
autonomous-agents.html: # Autonomous Agents Autonomous agents operate independently to complete tasks over time. Core Features * Goal-driven behavior * State persistence * Iterative reasoning Risks * Unbounded execution * Goal drift * Resource misuse Integration Used in: * agent-systems * multi-agent-systems ```mermaid flowchart LR Goal --> Reasoning --> Action --> Feedback --> Reasoning ``` See also * agent-overreach * reasoning-vs-execution

backpressure.title: Backpressure
backpressure.markdown:
# Backpressure

Controls the rate of incoming requests to prevent overload.

Core Features

* flow control
* load regulation
* system stability

Integration

Used in:

* [[async-systems]]
* [[event-driven-architecture]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Producer --> Queue --> Consumer
    Queue --> Limit
```

See also

* [[failure-cascades]]
backpressure.html: # Backpressure Controls the rate of incoming requests to prevent overload. Core Features * flow control * load regulation * system stability Integration Used in: * async-systems * event-driven-architecture ```mermaid flowchart LR Producer --> Queue --> Consumer Queue --> Limit ``` See also * failure-cascades

behavioral-biometrics.title: Behavioral Biometrics
behavioral-biometrics.markdown:
# Behavioral Biometrics

Users are identified by how they behave, not what they know.

Core Features

* typing patterns
* touch dynamics
* navigation behavior

Why it matters

Prevents:

* SIM swap fraud
* account takeover
* bot attacks

Integration

Core to:

* [[anomaly-detection]]
* [[session-risk-scoring]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Behavior --> Features --> Model --> IdentityScore[Identity Score]
```

See also

* [[feature-engineering]]
behavioral-biometrics.html: # Behavioral Biometrics Users are identified by how they behave, not what they know. Core Features * typing patterns * touch dynamics * navigation behavior Why it matters Prevents: * SIM swap fraud * account takeover * bot attacks Integration Core to: * anomaly-detection * session-risk-scoring ```mermaid flowchart LR Behavior --> Features --> Model --> IdentityScore[Identity Score] ``` See also * feature-engineering

circuit-breaker-pattern.title: Circuit Breaker Pattern
circuit-breaker-pattern.markdown:
# Circuit Breaker Pattern

Stops execution when risk exceeds acceptable thresholds.

Core Features

* Automatic halting
* Threshold-based triggers
* Recovery mechanisms

Integration

Used in:

* [[agent-runtime-authority]]
* [[event-driven-architecture]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Action --> Check --> Safe? --> Execute
    Check --> Risk --> Halt
```

See also

* [[approval-workflows]]
* [[agent-overreach]]
circuit-breaker-pattern.html: # Circuit Breaker Pattern Stops execution when risk exceeds acceptable thresholds. Core Features * Automatic halting * Threshold-based triggers * Recovery mechanisms Integration Used in: * agent-runtime-authority * event-driven-architecture ```mermaid flowchart LR Action --> Check --> Safe? --> Execute Check --> Risk --> Halt ``` See also * approval-workflows * agent-overreach

consent-token.title: Consent Token
consent-token.markdown:
# Consent Token

A token representing user-approved actions.

Core Features

* Scoped permissions
* Single-use
* Time-bound validity

Integration

Used in:

* [[policy-engine]]
* [[approval-workflows]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    User --> Approve --> Token --> Execute
```

See also

* [[agent-identity-iam]]
consent-token.html: # Consent Token A token representing user-approved actions. Core Features * Scoped permissions * Single-use * Time-bound validity Integration Used in: * policy-engine * approval-workflows ```mermaid flowchart LR User --> Approve --> Token --> Execute ``` See also * agent-identity-iam

control-plane-vs-data-plane.title: Control Plane vs Data Plane
control-plane-vs-data-plane.markdown:
# Control Plane vs Data Plane

Systems separate:

* Control Plane → decisions, policies
* Data Plane → execution

Core Features

* clear separation of concerns
* scalable execution
* centralized decision logic

Integration

Core to:

* [[policy-engine]]
* [[reasoning-vs-execution]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Control --> Decision --> Data --> Execution
```

See also

* [[deterministic-control-plane]]
control-plane-vs-data-plane.html: # Control Plane vs Data Plane Systems separate: * Control Plane → decisions, policies * Data Plane → execution Core Features * clear separation of concerns * scalable execution * centralized decision logic Integration Core to: * policy-engine * reasoning-vs-execution ```mermaid flowchart LR Control --> Decision --> Data --> Execution ``` See also * deterministic-control-plane

distributed-systems.title: Distributed Systems
distributed-systems.markdown:
# Distributed Systems

A distributed system consists of multiple nodes working together to achieve a common goal.

Core Features

* Partial failure
* Network communication
* Scalability

Challenges

* consistency
* latency
* fault tolerance

Integration

Foundation for:

* [[multi-agent-systems]]
* [[event-driven-architecture]]

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Node A] --> B[Node B]
    B --> C[Node C]
    C --> A
```

See also

* [[failure-cascades]]
* [[observability]]
distributed-systems.html: # Distributed Systems A distributed system consists of multiple nodes working together to achieve a common goal. Core Features * Partial failure * Network communication * Scalability Challenges * consistency * latency * fault tolerance Integration Foundation for: * multi-agent-systems * event-driven-architecture ```mermaid graph TD A[Node A] --> B[Node B] B --> C[Node C] C --> A ``` See also * failure-cascades * observability

dynamical-systems.title: Dynamical Systems
dynamical-systems.markdown:
# Dynamical Systems

Systems evolve based on state and time.

Core Features

* state evolution
* feedback loops
* stability vs chaos

Integration

Used in:

* [[time-series-modeling]]
* [[multi-agent-systems]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    State --> Update --> NewState[New State]
```

See also

* [[failure-cascades]]
dynamical-systems.html: # Dynamical Systems Systems evolve based on state and time. Core Features * state evolution * feedback loops * stability vs chaos Integration Used in: * time-series-modeling * multi-agent-systems ```mermaid flowchart LR State --> Update --> NewState[New State] ``` See also * failure-cascades

event-driven-architecture.title: Event Driven Architecture
event-driven-architecture.markdown:
# Event Driven Architecture

Components communicate via events instead of direct calls.

Core Features

* Loose coupling
* Asynchronous execution
* Scalability

Integration

Used in:

* [[distributed-systems]]
* [[circuit-breaker-pattern]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Producer --> Event --> Consumer
```

See also

* [[async-systems]]
* [[backpressure]]
event-driven-architecture.html: # Event Driven Architecture Components communicate via events instead of direct calls. Core Features * Loose coupling * Asynchronous execution * Scalability Integration Used in: * distributed-systems * circuit-breaker-pattern ```mermaid flowchart LR Producer --> Event --> Consumer ``` See also * async-systems * backpressure

failure-cascades.title: Failure Cascades
failure-cascades.markdown:
# Failure Cascades

Failures in one component propagate to others.

Core Features

* dependency chains
* amplification effects
* systemic risk

Integration

Seen in:

* [[multi-agent-systems]]
* [[agent-overreach]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    FailureA --> FailureB --> FailureC
```

See also

* [[circuit-breaker-pattern]]
* [[backpressure]]
failure-cascades.html: # Failure Cascades Failures in one component propagate to others. Core Features * dependency chains * amplification effects * systemic risk Integration Seen in: * multi-agent-systems * agent-overreach ```mermaid flowchart LR FailureA --> FailureB --> FailureC ``` See also * circuit-breaker-pattern * backpressure

feature-engineering.title: Feature Engineering
feature-engineering.markdown:
# Feature Engineering

Raw signals must be converted into structured features.

Core Features

* transformation
* normalization
* dimensional representation

Integration

Used in:

* [[behavioral-biometrics]]
* [[statistical-learning]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    RawData[Raw Data] --> Transform --> Features
```

See also

* [[signal-vs-noise]]
feature-engineering.html: # Feature Engineering Raw signals must be converted into structured features. Core Features * transformation * normalization * dimensional representation Integration Used in: * behavioral-biometrics * statistical-learning ```mermaid flowchart LR RawData[Raw Data] --> Transform --> Features ``` See also * signal-vs-noise

intent-validation.title: Intent Validation
intent-validation.markdown:
# Intent Validation

Validates that an agent’s action matches the original user goal.

Core Features

* Semantic comparison
* Drift detection
* Instruction consistency

Risks addressed

* [[prompt-injection]]
* [[agent-overreach]]

Integration

Used in:

* [[agent-runtime-authority]]
* [[policy-engine]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    UserIntent --> Compare --> AgentAction --> Match?
```

See also

* [[rag-security]]
* [[approval-workflows]]
intent-validation.html: # Intent Validation Validates that an agent’s action matches the original user goal. Core Features * Semantic comparison * Drift detection * Instruction consistency Risks addressed * prompt-injection * agent-overreach Integration Used in: * agent-runtime-authority * policy-engine ```mermaid flowchart LR UserIntent --> Compare --> AgentAction --> Match? ``` See also * rag-security * approval-workflows

llm-as-untrusted-component.title: LLM as Untrusted Component
llm-as-untrusted-component.markdown:
# LLM as Untrusted Component

LLMs generate outputs probabilistically and must not be trusted with execution authority.

Core Features

* Non-deterministic outputs
* Prompt sensitivity
* No inherent safety guarantees

Principle

LLM = Suggestion engine, not decision engine

Integration

Used in:

* [[reasoning-vs-execution]]
* [[prompt-injection]]

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    User->>LLM: Input
    LLM-->>System: Suggested action
    System->>Policy: Validate
    Policy-->>System: Approve/Deny
```

See also

* [[agent-overreach]]
* [[rag-systems]]
llm-as-untrusted-component.html: # LLM as Untrusted Component LLMs generate outputs probabilistically and must not be trusted with execution authority. Core Features * Non-deterministic outputs * Prompt sensitivity * No inherent safety guarantees Principle LLM = Suggestion engine, not decision engine Integration Used in: * reasoning-vs-execution * prompt-injection ```mermaid sequenceDiagram User->>LLM: Input LLM-->>System: Suggested action System->>Policy: Validate Policy-->>System: Approve/Deny ``` See also * agent-overreach * rag-systems

lstm-autoencoder.title: LSTM Autoencoder
lstm-autoencoder.markdown:
# LSTM Autoencoder

Models sequential data and detects anomalies via reconstruction error.

Core Features

* sequence learning
* reconstruction error
* temporal modeling

Integration

Used in:

* [[time-series-modeling]]
* [[anomaly-detection]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Sequence --> Encoder --> Decoder --> Reconstruction --> Error
```

See also

* [[dynamical-systems]]
lstm-autoencoder.html: # LSTM Autoencoder Models sequential data and detects anomalies via reconstruction error. Core Features * sequence learning * reconstruction error * temporal modeling Integration Used in: * time-series-modeling * anomaly-detection ```mermaid flowchart LR Sequence --> Encoder --> Decoder --> Reconstruction --> Error ``` See also * dynamical-systems

multi-agent-systems.title: Multi-Agent Systems
multi-agent-systems.markdown:
# Multi-Agent Systems

Multiple agents collaborate or compete to solve tasks.

Core Features

* Agent-to-agent communication
* Distributed reasoning
* Emergent behavior

Risks

* Coordination failure
* Cascading errors
* Assumption propagation

Integration

Built on:

* [[agent-systems]]
* [[autonomous-agents]]

```mermaid
graph TD
    A1[Agent 1] --> A2[Agent 2]
    A2 --> A3[Agent 3]
    A3 --> A1
```

See also

* [[agent-overreach]]
* [[reasoning-vs-execution]]
multi-agent-systems.html: # Multi-Agent Systems Multiple agents collaborate or compete to solve tasks. Core Features * Agent-to-agent communication * Distributed reasoning * Emergent behavior Risks * Coordination failure * Cascading errors * Assumption propagation Integration Built on: * agent-systems * autonomous-agents ```mermaid graph TD A1[Agent 1] --> A2[Agent 2] A2 --> A3[Agent 3] A3 --> A1 ``` See also * agent-overreach * reasoning-vs-execution

observability.title: Observability
observability.markdown:
# Observability

Observability enables insight into system behavior.

Core Features

* Logs
* Metrics
* Traces

Why it matters

* debugging
* performance monitoring
* anomaly detection

Integration

Used in:

* [[audit-ledger]]
* [[anomaly-detection-security]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    System --> Logs
    System --> Metrics
    System --> Traces
```

See also

* [[failure-cascades]]
observability.html: # Observability Observability enables insight into system behavior. Core Features * Logs * Metrics * Traces Why it matters * debugging * performance monitoring * anomaly detection Integration Used in: * audit-ledger * anomaly-detection-security ```mermaid flowchart LR System --> Logs System --> Metrics System --> Traces ``` See also * failure-cascades

one-class-svm.title: One-Class SVM
one-class-svm.markdown:
# One-Class SVM

Learns the boundary of normal data and flags outliers.

Core Features

* unsupervised learning
* boundary detection
* anomaly scoring

Integration

Used in:

* [[anomaly-detection]]
* [[behavioral-biometrics]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    NormalData[Normal Data] --> Model --> Boundary --> Outlier?
```

See also

* [[statistical-learning]]
one-class-svm.html: # One-Class SVM Learns the boundary of normal data and flags outliers. Core Features * unsupervised learning * boundary detection * anomaly scoring Integration Used in: * anomaly-detection * behavioral-biometrics ```mermaid flowchart LR NormalData[Normal Data] --> Model --> Boundary --> Outlier? ``` See also * statistical-learning

policy-engine.title: Policy Engine
policy-engine.markdown:
# Policy Engine

Policy Engine

A rule-based system that decides whether actions are allowed.

Core Features

* Deterministic evaluation
* Rule enforcement
* Risk scoring

Integration

Core to:

* [[runtime-governance]]
* [[reasoning-vs-execution]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Input --> Rules --> Decision
```

See also

* [[consent-token]]
* [[circuit-breaker-pattern]]
policy-engine.html: # Policy Engine Policy Engine A rule-based system that decides whether actions are allowed. Core Features * Deterministic evaluation * Rule enforcement * Risk scoring Integration Core to: * runtime-governance * reasoning-vs-execution ```mermaid flowchart LR Input --> Rules --> Decision ``` See also * consent-token * circuit-breaker-pattern

prompt-injection.title: Prompt Injection
prompt-injection.markdown:
# Prompt Injection

Prompt injection exploits LLM trust in input data.

Core Features

* Instruction hijacking
* Context manipulation
* Hidden directives

Impact

* Data leakage
* Unauthorized actions
* System compromise

Integration

Critical for:

* [[rag-systems]]
* [[llm-as-untrusted-component]]

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    Attacker->>LLM: Malicious prompt
    LLM->>System: Altered instruction
    System: Executes unintended action
```

See also

* [[agent-overreach]]
* [[reasoning-vs-execution]]
prompt-injection.html: # Prompt Injection Prompt injection exploits LLM trust in input data. Core Features * Instruction hijacking * Context manipulation * Hidden directives Impact * Data leakage * Unauthorized actions * System compromise Integration Critical for: * rag-systems * llm-as-untrusted-component ```mermaid sequenceDiagram Attacker->>LLM: Malicious prompt LLM->>System: Altered instruction System: Executes unintended action ``` See also * agent-overreach * reasoning-vs-execution

rag-security.title: RAG Security
rag-security.markdown:
# RAG Security

Protects systems using external knowledge sources.

Core Features

* Source validation
* Instruction filtering
* Access control

Risks addressed

* [[prompt-injection]]
* [[agent-overreach]]

Integration

Used in:

* [[rag-systems]]
* [[tool-augmented-agents]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Retriever --> Filter --> SafeContext --> LLM
```

See also

* [[intent-validation]]
rag-security.html: # RAG Security Protects systems using external knowledge sources. Core Features * Source validation * Instruction filtering * Access control Risks addressed * prompt-injection * agent-overreach Integration Used in: * rag-systems * tool-augmented-agents ```mermaid flowchart LR Retriever --> Filter --> SafeContext --> LLM ``` See also * intent-validation

rag-systems.title: RAG Systems
rag-systems.markdown:
# RAG Systems

RAG combines retrieval with generation for better responses.

Core Features

* External knowledge retrieval
* Context injection
* Improved accuracy

Risks

* Data poisoning
* Hidden instructions
* Permission bypass

Integration

Used in:

* [[tool-augmented-agents]]
* [[llm-as-untrusted-component]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Query --> Retriever --> Context --> LLM --> Output
```

See also

* [[prompt-injection]]
* [[agent-overreach]]
rag-systems.html: # RAG Systems RAG combines retrieval with generation for better responses. Core Features * External knowledge retrieval * Context injection * Improved accuracy Risks * Data poisoning * Hidden instructions * Permission bypass Integration Used in: * tool-augmented-agents * llm-as-untrusted-component ```mermaid flowchart LR Query --> Retriever --> Context --> LLM --> Output ``` See also * prompt-injection * agent-overreach

reasoning-vs-execution.title: Reasoning vs Execution
reasoning-vs-execution.markdown:
# Reasoning vs Execution

AI systems must separate reasoning from execution.

Core Features

* Reasoning Layer: LLM interprets intent
* Execution Layer: Deterministic system acts

Why it matters

Prevents:

* hallucinated actions
* unsafe execution
* agent misuse

Integration

Core to:

* [[llm-as-untrusted-component]]
* [[agent-systems]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Input --> LLM --> Intent --> Policy --> Execution
```

See also

* [[agent-overreach]]
* [[prompt-injection]]
reasoning-vs-execution.html: # Reasoning vs Execution AI systems must separate reasoning from execution. Core Features * Reasoning Layer: LLM interprets intent * Execution Layer: Deterministic system acts Why it matters Prevents: * hallucinated actions * unsafe execution * agent misuse Integration Core to: * llm-as-untrusted-component * agent-systems ```mermaid flowchart LR Input --> LLM --> Intent --> Policy --> Execution ``` See also * agent-overreach * prompt-injection

runtime-governance.title: Runtime Governance
runtime-governance.markdown:
# Runtime Governance

Runtime governance ensures that AI systems are controlled while they act, not just during design.

Core Features

* Execution-time enforcement
* Continuous validation
* Real-time intervention

Why it matters

Static rules fail because:

* agents evolve behavior
* context changes dynamically
* threats are adaptive

Integration

Critical for:

* [[agent-systems]]
* [[autonomous-agents]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Agent --> Governance --> Decision --> Execution
```

See also

* [[agent-runtime-authority]]
* [[policy-engine]]
runtime-governance.html: # Runtime Governance Runtime governance ensures that AI systems are controlled while they act, not just during design. Core Features * Execution-time enforcement * Continuous validation * Real-time intervention Why it matters Static rules fail because: * agents evolve behavior * context changes dynamically * threats are adaptive Integration Critical for: * agent-systems * autonomous-agents ```mermaid flowchart LR Agent --> Governance --> Decision --> Execution ``` See also * agent-runtime-authority * policy-engine

signal-vs-noise.title: Signal vs Noise
signal-vs-noise.markdown:
# Signal vs Noise

Not all data is meaningful. Systems must extract signal from noise.

Core Features

* pattern detection
* filtering
* statistical significance

Integration

Used in:

* [[feature-engineering]]
* [[statistical-learning]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Data --> Filter --> Signal
    Data --> Filter --> Noise
```

See also

* [[anomaly-detection]]
signal-vs-noise.html: # Signal vs Noise Not all data is meaningful. Systems must extract signal from noise. Core Features * pattern detection * filtering * statistical significance Integration Used in: * feature-engineering * statistical-learning ```mermaid flowchart LR Data --> Filter --> Signal Data --> Filter --> Noise ``` See also * anomaly-detection

state-machines.title: State Machines
state-machines.markdown:
# State Machines

Systems transition between predefined states based on inputs.

Core Features

* deterministic transitions
* predictable behavior
* explicit states

Integration

Used in:

* [[policy-engine]]
* [[approval-workflows]]

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle
    Idle --> Processing
    Processing --> Complete
```

See also

* [[control-plane-vs-data-plane]]
state-machines.html: # State Machines Systems transition between predefined states based on inputs. Core Features * deterministic transitions * predictable behavior * explicit states Integration Used in: * policy-engine * approval-workflows ```mermaid stateDiagram-v2 [*] --> Idle Idle --> Processing Processing --> Complete ``` See also * control-plane-vs-data-plane

statistical-learning.title: Statistical Learning
statistical-learning.markdown:
# Statistical Learning

Models learn distributions and patterns from data.

Core Features

* probability distributions
* inference
* generalization

Integration

Used in:

* [[one-class-svm]]
* [[anomaly-detection]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Data --> Model --> Prediction
```

See also

* [[signal-vs-noise]]
statistical-learning.html: # Statistical Learning Models learn distributions and patterns from data. Core Features * probability distributions * inference * generalization Integration Used in: * one-class-svm * anomaly-detection ```mermaid flowchart LR Data --> Model --> Prediction ``` See also * signal-vs-noise

time-series-modeling.title: Time Series Modeling
time-series-modeling.markdown:
# Time Series Modeling

Behavior changes over time and must be modeled sequentially.

Core Features

* temporal dependencies
* sequence patterns
* trend analysis

Integration

Used in:

* [[lstm-autoencoder]]
* [[anomaly-detection]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    t1 --> t2 --> t3 --> t4
```

See also

* [[dynamical-systems]]
time-series-modeling.html: # Time Series Modeling Behavior changes over time and must be modeled sequentially. Core Features * temporal dependencies * sequence patterns * trend analysis Integration Used in: * lstm-autoencoder * anomaly-detection ```mermaid flowchart LR t1 --> t2 --> t3 --> t4 ``` See also * dynamical-systems

tool-augmented-agents.title: Tool-Augmented Agents
tool-augmented-agents.markdown:
# Tool-Augmented Agents

Agents extend capabilities by using tools like APIs, databases, and services.

Core Features

* External tool access
* Dynamic execution
* Context-aware actions

Risks

* Unauthorized tool usage
* Data leakage
* Execution abuse

Integration

Used in:

* [[agent-systems]]
* [[rag-systems]]

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    Agent->>Tool: API Call
    Tool-->>Agent: Response
```

See also

* [[prompt-injection]]
* [[agent-overreach]]
tool-augmented-agents.html: # Tool-Augmented Agents Agents extend capabilities by using tools like APIs, databases, and services. Core Features * External tool access * Dynamic execution * Context-aware actions Risks * Unauthorized tool usage * Data leakage * Execution abuse Integration Used in: * agent-systems * rag-systems ```mermaid sequenceDiagram Agent->>Tool: API Call Tool-->>Agent: Response ``` See also * prompt-injection * agent-overreach

tool-execution-guard.title: Tool Execution Guard
tool-execution-guard.markdown:
# Tool Execution Guard

Ensures only approved tools are executed with valid permissions.

Core Features

* Tool registration
* Permission checks
* Execution validation

Integration

Used in:

* [[agent-runtime-authority]]
* [[tool-augmented-agents]]

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    Agent->>Guard: Call Tool
    Guard->>Policy: Validate
    Policy-->>Guard: Allow/Deny
```

See also

* [[prompt-injection]]
* [[agent-overreach]]
tool-execution-guard.html: # Tool Execution Guard Ensures only approved tools are executed with valid permissions. Core Features * Tool registration * Permission checks * Execution validation Integration Used in: * agent-runtime-authority * tool-augmented-agents ```mermaid sequenceDiagram Agent->>Guard: Call Tool Guard->>Policy: Validate Policy-->>Guard: Allow/Deny ``` See also * prompt-injection * agent-overreach

zero-trust-architecture.title: Zero Trust Architecture
zero-trust-architecture.markdown:
# Zero Trust Architecture

Every component is treated as potentially compromised.

Core Features

* No implicit trust
* Continuous verification
* Strict access control

Integration

Applied to:

* [[llm-as-untrusted-component]]
* [[runtime-governance]]

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Request --> Verify --> Access
```

See also

* [[intent-validation]]
* [[policy-engine]]
zero-trust-architecture.html: # Zero Trust Architecture Every component is treated as potentially compromised. Core Features * No implicit trust * Continuous verification * Strict access control Integration Applied to: * llm-as-untrusted-component * runtime-governance ```mermaid flowchart LR Request --> Verify --> Access ``` See also * intent-validation * policy-engine
